tasks.title: Add `test_share_mode_variants` Test
tasks.description: Add test case matching PRD test design exactly for ShareMode serialization. ShareMode::Auto should serialize to "auto", ShareMode::Collaborative to "collaborative".
tasks.impl_notes: Add test case to crates/config/src/lib.rs tests module matching PRD spec exactly: assert_eq!(serde_json::to_string(&ShareMode::Auto).unwrap(), "\"auto\"");

tasks.title: Rename Scroll Acceleration Test to Match PRD
tasks.description: Test exists at line 4032-4037 but named differently from PRD. Current name is likely test_scroll_acceleration_*. Required name is test_tui_config_scroll_acceleration_legacy_number.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify test is renamed to test_tui_config_scroll_acceleration_legacy_number
tasks.impl_notes: Find and rename existing test in crates/config/src/lib.rs (around line 4032-4037) from current name to test_tui_config_scroll_acceleration_legacy_number

tasks.title: Add Schema Fallback Integration Test
tasks.description: Add integration test for builtin_config.schema.json fallback behavior. If bundled schema is malformed, empty object schema should be used gracefully.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify schema fallback works when bundled schema is malformed
AddIntegrationTest: verify empty object schema is used as fallback
tasks.impl_notes: Add test in crates/config/src/schema.rs that simulates malformed bundled schema and verifies graceful fallback to empty object schema

tasks.title: Audit `LegacyProvider` Enum
tasks.description: LegacyProvider enum defined but never used in Config or tested. Determine if should be removed or documented as intentionally kept.
test_criteria: AddAuditTask: document findings about LegacyProvider usage
AddDecision: either remove enum or document why it exists
tasks.impl_notes: Audit LegacyProvider enum in crates/config/src/lib.rs. Check if used anywhere in config loading/parsing. Decide to remove or document.

tasks.title: Lint Suppression Cleanup
tasks.description: Clean up dead code lint suppressions: 1) get_official_schema_url has #[allow(dead_code)] - use or remove, 2) parse_jsonc_file in jsonc.rs has #[allow(dead_code)] - make public/use or remove
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify get_official_schema_url is used or lint removed
AddRegressionTest: verify parse_jsonc_file is used or lint removed
RunTestSuite: cargo clippy -p opencode-config -- -D warnings passes
tasks.impl_notes: Review #[allow(dead_code)] in crates/config/src/lib.rs (get_official_schema_url) and crates/config/src/jsonc.rs (parse_jsonc_file). Either make them public and use, or remove the lint suppression.

tasks.title: SchemaError Message Improvement
tasks.description: SchemaError::HttpClient message mentions "Thread panicked" - implementation detail leaking. Improve error message abstraction.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify SchemaError::HttpClient has improved error message
AddRegressionTest: error message no longer mentions "Thread panicked"
tasks.impl_notes: Improve SchemaError::HttpClient message in crates/config/src/schema.rs to not leak implementation details like "Thread panicked". Use more abstract error description.
